meaning: n.晚祷,(天主教每天七段祈祷中的)晚课
examples: The boys went to sleep after vespers.
Roman catholic church: vespers of the office for the dead.
All - Night Vigil, Op. 37, Vespers: Bless the Lord, o my soul.
Lunch, another vote, vespers and an 8 p.m. dinner are also on the schedule.
In the Italian capital, Rome, Pope Benedict XVI celebrated with a vespers service in St Peter's Basilica to give thanks for 2012 and look ahead to 2013.
